results.heading: Results
results.emptyBody: Fill in the form on the left to calculate your BOM instantly.
results.placeholder: Results will appear here once you enter sizing parameters.

placeholders.topologyBody: The Leaf-Spine topology diagram will be available after sizing parameters are entered.
placeholders.rackElevationBody: The rack elevation view will be available in a future phase.
placeholders.exportBody: Export to CSV and PDF will be available in a future phase.

validation.serverCountMin: Server count must be at least 1
validation.serversPerRackMax: Maximum 48 servers per rack for OOB port compatibility
